Date: {{date}}

To whom it may concern,

This experience letter confirms that {{name}} was associated with {{company_name}} as {{role}} under the {{department}} department. The association is recorded under reference number {{reference_id}} and is issued for professional reference, employment verification, academic verification, client verification, vendor verification, or other legitimate background verification purposes.

The company record identifies the experience as {{role_context}}. {{timeline_statement}} {{status_statement}} The experience recorded in this letter is based on HRFLOW data, supporting lifecycle records, and company-maintained engagement information available as of {{date}}.

Reference ID{{reference_id}}
Start Date{{joining_date}}
Date Of Exit{{exit_date}}
Engagement Duration{{duration}}
Reporting Manager{{manager}}
Lifecycle Status{{status}}
BGV Contact{{bgv_email}}
Verification URL{{verify_url}}

Engagement Summary

{{name}} worked under the supervision of {{manager}} and was associated with the {{department}} department for responsibilities relevant to {{role}}. The engagement included practical exposure, task ownership, internal coordination, documentation, reviews, reporting, compliance with company instructions, and responsible participation in assigned work.

The role may have required coordination with team members, maintaining work updates, preparing or reviewing documents, supporting project or operational activities, learning company processes, using approved tools, and completing work in line with quality, confidentiality, and timeline expectations. Any role-specific assignment depended on business needs, project availability, manager allocation, access approvals, and the department's operating requirements.

Scope Of Work And Capability Areas

  • Supported assigned project, business, operational, learning, or departmental activities relevant to {{role}}.
  • Prepared, reviewed, maintained, or submitted work-related information, documentation, reports, task updates, or deliverables as required.
  • Participated in discussions, reviews, status meetings, knowledge transfer, handover, and coordination activities under managerial supervision.
  • Followed professional instructions, confidentiality expectations, information security practices, and responsible use of company resources.
  • Maintained expected conduct relating to attendance, communication, timelines, quality of work, and accountability for assigned responsibilities.
  • Used approved systems, communication channels, repositories, files, and digital tools for authorized work only.

Performance, Conduct And Compliance

During the association, {{name}} was expected to demonstrate discipline, learning ability, professional communication, respect for deadlines, responsible handling of information, and compliance with workplace rules. The experience record does not by itself create any future employment commitment, compensation entitlement, statutory certification, or waiver of confidentiality, handover, data protection, or intellectual property obligations.

Information Security And Future-Ready Verification

{{digital_record_statement}} {{verification_statement}} The company supports verification through controlled reference IDs, QR codes, barcode identifiers, and official BGV contact channels so that future employers, academic institutions, clients, or authorized verifiers can validate the record without relying on altered or incomplete copies.

Record Limitation

This letter records the association, role, department, timeline, reporting manager, and lifecycle status available in company records. It should not be interpreted as a character certificate, immigration certificate, regulatory approval, compensation statement, or guarantee of future performance. Any third-party use must be limited to legitimate verification purposes.

This experience letter can be verified using reference number {{reference_id}}, the QR code printed on this document, {{verify_url}}, or by contacting {{bgv_email}}.

We thank {{name}} for the association with {{company_name}} and extend our best wishes for future opportunities.
